case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORP. vs. BELVIN, ROBERT ROSS et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT BELVIN, ROBERT ROSS DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT BELVIN, ROBERT ROSS

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT BELVIN, ROBERT ROSS
